"[9] [21:13:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431 has entered the chat[21:13:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.The user has requested that Apple share messages in this conversation with one or more of their emergency contacts. Any text sent or received may be visible to the identified contact(s).[21:13:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: At 05:12AM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 36.0837 (N), Longitude -120.4876 (W).Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 345 meters. Responders may need to search 10 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user has cached Enhanced Emergency Data with Apple. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA![21:13:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +15599442431.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.This request is for ME.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The person in need IS NOT injured.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.TCC or PSAP systems may garble this language's script. Return messages to the user will not be garbled.[21:13:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: This concludes the initial data. Two-way text with the user is now available.[21:14:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga has entered the chat[21:14:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: WHAT TYPE OF VEHICLE ARE YOU IN ?[21:14:33 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: Acura rsx [21:14:43 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: Silver[21:14:48 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: WHAT DID YOU HIT?[21:15:19 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: A side hill[21:16:09 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: IS THERE ANY ROAD BLOCKAGE?[21:17:50 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: There s none [21:18:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: IS YOUR VEHICLE DRIVEABLE?[21:18:26 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: No[21:18:54 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: WOULD YOU LIKE US TO START A TOW ON YOUR BEHALF?[21:19:38 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: Yes please [21:20:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: OKAY WE WILL GET AN OFFICER AND TOW TRUCK HEADED TO YOU [21:20:29 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: Thanks [21:20:37 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: IF ANYTHING CHANGES LIKE YOU FEEL YOU NEED MEDICAL TEXT OR CALL BACK INTO 911 TE[21:20:46 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: WHAT IS YOUR FIRST AND LAST NAME? [21:21:28 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] (559) 944-2431: Jose Lopez [21:23:34 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026] Yvonne Arteaga: TAKE ALL PRECAUTIONS FOR YOUR SAFETY, EPPLER TOW AND A CHP OFFICER IS HEADED TO YOU Call initiated: 21:13:05 GMT-08:00 07 Feb 2026Phone number: (559) 944-2431"
